title: ASPIRE: Agentic /Skills Discovery for Robotics
innovation_summary: ASPIRE: Agentic /Skills Discovery for Robotics: We introduce ASPIRE (Agentic Skill Programming through Iterative Robot Exploration), a continual learning system that autonomously writes and refines robot control programs in a code-as-policy paradigm.
